name: company-creator
tagline: Interactively scaffolds agent-company packages (COMPANY.md, agents, teams, skills) conforming to the agentcompanies/v1 spec, from scratch.
verdict: Well-structured generative skill with clear conventions, sensible defaults, and worked examples for every required format. Gaps: no failure handling for repo-clone/spec-read errors in from-repo mode, no scope-exclusion guidance, and no version or changelog signal to track changes to the skill itself.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/exclusion guidance stated anywhere in description or body.
From-repo mode depends on cloning/reading an external repo and spec files, but no step states what to do if the clone, repo read, or spec file is missing/unreadable.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
